# #1166 - wrong results of union_ or difference with double and rescaling [Closed]

> Username: BenoitAndrieu  
> Created at: 2023-06-21 12:36:04 UTC  
> Updated at: 2023-06-25 20:05:03 UTC  
> Closed at: 2023-06-25 20:05:03 UTC  
> Url: https://github.com/boostorg/geometry/issues/1166  

Hi, I am posting some results I have with using `double` and `BOOST_GEOMETRY_ROBUSTNESS_ALTERNATIVE`.  
Thanks for any hints.  
  
```  
#include <boost/geometry.hpp>  
#include <gtest/gtest.h>  
  
using boost_coordinate_t = double;  
using boost_point_2d = boost::geometry::model::d2::point_xy<boost_coordinate_t>;  
using boost_polygon_2d = boost::geometry::model::polygon<boost_point_2d>;  
using boost_multipolygon_2d = boost::geometry::model::multi_polygon<boost_polygon_2d>;  
```

---

## Comment 1

> Username: BenoitAndrieu  
> Created at: 2023-06-21 12:36:41 UTC  
> Url: https://github.com/boostorg/geometry/issues/1166#issuecomment-1600756306  

```  
TEST(TestCaseName, UnionCheckCase009)  
{  
	auto one = boost::geometry::from_wkt<boost_multipolygon_2d>("MULTIPOLYGON(((3.019999999999999573674358543939888477325439453125 0.219999999999996476152119839753140695393085479736328125,3.120000000000000994759830064140260219573974609375 0.339999999999996471711227741252514533698558807373046875,13.53999999999999914734871708787977695465087890625 0.339999999999999802380301616722135804593563079833984375,13.8599999999999976552089719916693866252899169921875 0.019999999999999955313523258837449247948825359344482421875,13.8799999999999972288833305356092751026153564453125 -3.81639164714905449379675596024273599707527827862296732064351090230047702789306640625e-17,3.1700000000000017053025658242404460906982421875 -3.48276263207884465082536350130923807559056126596785940563449912588112056255340576171875e-15,3.1700000000000017053025658242404460906982421875 0.2199999999999965039076954553820542059838771820068359375,3.019999999999999573674358543939888477325439453125 0.219999999999996476152119839753140695393085479736328125)),((1.0500000000000013766765505351941101253032684326171875 7.6699999999999999289457264239899814128875732421875,0.2200000000000005007105841059455997310578823089599609375 7.6699999999999999289457264239899814128875732421875,0.020000000000000517363929475322947837412357330322265625 7.87000000000000010658141036401502788066864013671875,5.169475958410885141347534954547882080078125e-16 7.88999999999999968025576890795491635799407958984375,1.0500000000000013766765505351941101253032684326171875 7.88999999999999968025576890795491635799407958984375,1.0500000000000013766765505351941101253032684326171875 7.6699999999999999289457264239899814128875732421875)))");  
	auto one_area = boost::geometry::area(one);  
  
	auto two = boost::geometry::from_wkt<boost_multipolygon_2d>("MULTIPOLYGON(((13.879999999999999005240169935859739780426025390625 7.88999999999999968025576890795491635799407958984375,13.8799999999999972288833305356092751026153564453125 0,13.53999999999999914734871708787977695465087890625 0.339999999999999913402604079237789846956729888916015625,13.5400000000000009237055564881302416324615478515625 7.54999999999999982236431605997495353221893310546875,13.879999999999999005240169935859739780426025390625 7.88999999999999968025576890795491635799407958984375)))");  
	auto two_area = boost::geometry::area(two);  
  
	boost_multipolygon_2d union_result;  
	boost::geometry::union_(one, two, union_result);  
	auto union_area = boost::geometry::area(union_result);  
  
	EXPECT_EQ(union_result.size(), 1);  
}  
```

## Comment 2

> Username: BenoitAndrieu  
> Created at: 2023-06-21 12:45:02 UTC  
> Url: https://github.com/boostorg/geometry/issues/1166#issuecomment-1600768946  

```  
TEST(TestCaseName, IntersectionCheckCase001)  
{  
	auto one = boost::geometry::from_wkt<boost_multipolygon_2d>("MULTIPOLYGON(((3.019999999999999573674358543939888477325439453125 0.219999999999996476152119839753140695393085479736328125,3.120000000000000994759830064140260219573974609375 0.339999999999996471711227741252514533698558807373046875,13.53999999999999914734871708787977695465087890625 0.339999999999999802380301616722135804593563079833984375,13.8599999999999976552089719916693866252899169921875 0.019999999999999955313523258837449247948825359344482421875,13.8799999999999972288833305356092751026153564453125 -3.81639164714905449379675596024273599707527827862296732064351090230047702789306640625e-17,3.1700000000000017053025658242404460906982421875 -3.48276263207884465082536350130923807559056126596785940563449912588112056255340576171875e-15,3.1700000000000017053025658242404460906982421875 0.2199999999999965039076954553820542059838771820068359375,3.019999999999999573674358543939888477325439453125 0.219999999999996476152119839753140695393085479736328125)),((1.0500000000000013766765505351941101253032684326171875 7.6699999999999999289457264239899814128875732421875,0.2200000000000005007105841059455997310578823089599609375 7.6699999999999999289457264239899814128875732421875,0.020000000000000517363929475322947837412357330322265625 7.87000000000000010658141036401502788066864013671875,5.169475958410885141347534954547882080078125e-16 7.88999999999999968025576890795491635799407958984375,1.0500000000000013766765505351941101253032684326171875 7.88999999999999968025576890795491635799407958984375,1.0500000000000013766765505351941101253032684326171875 7.6699999999999999289457264239899814128875732421875)))");  
	auto one_area = boost::geometry::area(one);  
  
	auto two = boost::geometry::from_wkt<boost_multipolygon_2d>("MULTIPOLYGON(((13.879999999999999005240169935859739780426025390625 7.88999999999999968025576890795491635799407958984375,13.8799999999999972288833305356092751026153564453125 0,13.53999999999999914734871708787977695465087890625 0.339999999999999913402604079237789846956729888916015625,13.5400000000000009237055564881302416324615478515625 7.54999999999999982236431605997495353221893310546875,13.879999999999999005240169935859739780426025390625 7.88999999999999968025576890795491635799407958984375)))");  
	auto two_area = boost::geometry::area(two);  
  
	boost_multipolygon_2d union_result;  
	boost::geometry::union_(one, two, union_result);  
	auto union_area = boost::geometry::area(union_result);  
  
	boost_multipolygon_2d intersection_result;  
	boost::geometry::intersection(union_result, two, intersection_result);  
	auto intersection_area = boost::geometry::area(intersection_result);  
  
	EXPECT_DOUBLE_EQ(intersection_area, two_area);  
}  
```

## Comment 5

> Username: barendgehrels  
> Created at: 2023-06-25 09:50:02 UTC  
> Url: https://github.com/boostorg/geometry/issues/1166#issuecomment-1605995908  

Sorry for the maybe confusing hints.  
  
But the `BOOST_GEOMETRY_ROBUSTNESS_ALTERNATIVE` (or its name `BOOST_GEOMETRY_USE_RESCALING`) are deprecated.  
  
They will be removed in 1.84 or later. But we cannot investigate these issues anymore.  
  
So I propose to close this. Any issue without these defines you can still report and will be investigated (even though they might be solved by using one of these defines).  
  
Can you close this issue?

---

## Comment 6

> Username: BenoitAndrieu  
> Created at: 2023-06-25 20:05:03 UTC  
> Url: https://github.com/boostorg/geometry/issues/1166#issuecomment-1606247587  

Thanks for the information, I wasn't aware of the deprecation of both defines. I will look for discussions on the subject.
